title: palicourea hazenii subsp. hazenii
intro: Palicourea hazenii subsp. hazenii, also known as the Hazen's palicourea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a sought-after herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Palicourea hazenii subsp. hazenii typically involve the leaves being dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules, which are then used to harness its medicinal properties.
